MINI MINUTES FOR APR-20-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT RICARDO LUCHA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION SHALL NOT BE GRANTED IF IT DOES NOT COMPLETELY DISPOSE OF A CAUSE OF ACTION, AN AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE, A CLAIM FOR DAMAGES, OR AN ISSUE OF DUTY. SEE CCP 437C(F)(1). THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION IS BASED, INTER ALIA, ON VIOLATION OF SFRO 37.10B; SEPARATE STATEMENT INCLUDES NO MATERIAL FACTS PERTAINING TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES OR ATTORNEY'S FEES (WHICH ARE AVAILABLE UNDER SFRO 37.10B). ADDITIONALLY, MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1350(B). PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE SUZANNE R. BOLANOS, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)
ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION (NO SASE, COPY IN DEPT. 501 PICK UP BOX)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2019 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-14-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-19-2018 Continued To Sep-17-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION And Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar Apr-20-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RICARDO LUCHA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED. Motion for summary adjudication shall not be granted if it does not completely dispose of a cause of action, an affirmative defense, a claim for damages, or an issue of duty. See CCP 437c(f)(1). The fourth cause of action is based, inter alia, on violation of SFRO 37.10B; separate statement includes no material facts pertaining to punitive damages or attorney's fees (which are available under SFRO 37.10B). Additionally, moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b).
Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2017 Set For Trial On May-21-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
